leadText: The Lustrous Globe (Japanese: だいしらたま Great Pearl Orb) is an item introduced in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It allows Palkia to change between its normal form and Origin Forme. It was a Key Item in Generation VIII. It is one of the orbs associated with the Pokémon of myth.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , when the Lustrous Globe is used from the satchel on Palkia, it switches it between its normal form and Origin Forme. In Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , if a Palkia is holding a Lustrous Globe, it changes to its Origin Forme. Additionally, it boosts Palkia's Dragon - and Water-type moves by 20%.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA When used on Palkia, this large, glowing orb wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form. S V An item to be held by Palkia. This large, glowing orb wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods LA Pearl Settlement (reward for defeating Irida to complete Request 90: "The Pearl Clan's Treasure") S V Porto Marinada auction (if the player owns a Palkia )
